title: Mr Men Mr. Bump Coaster – 10cm x 10cm Cork-Backed Drinks Coaster | Non-Slip, Easy Wipe Clean | Proudly Made in the UK | Durable Home & Office Accessory
features: Official Mr Men Design – Featuring the much-loved Mr. Bump, this coaster adds a playful touch to any home or office, ideal for fans of the classic British series.
Protects Your Surfaces – Measures 10cm x 10cm with a nonslip cork backing to prevent scratches, stains, and spills on your furniture.
Easy to Clean – Simply wipe with a damp cloth to keep your coaster looking fresh and ready for your next hot or cold drink.
High-Quality & Durable – Crafted with premium materials for long-lasting use while maintaining vibrant colour and design detail.
Perfect for Gifting – A fun and affordable gift idea for birthdays, Christmas, or any special occasion – collect all your favourite Mr Men characters!
description: Add a splash of colour and character to your home with this delightful Mr Men Mr. Bump Coaster – the perfect combination of practicality, durability, and nostalgic charm. Designed to protect your surfaces in style, this high-quality coaster is proudly produced in the UK and makes a fun, functional addition to any kitchen, living room, or office. Each coaster measures 10cm x 10cm and features a nonslip cork backing to keep it securely in place while preventing scratches and marks on your furniture. The smooth, easy wipe-clean surface ensures effortless maintenance, making it perfect for both hot and cold drinks. Whether you’re enjoying your morning coffee or an evening cuppa, this coaster keeps your tabletops looking their best. Crafted with care using durable, high-quality materials, the Mr. Bump coaster is designed to last — combining everyday practicality with timeless design. Its bright, cheerful artwork captures the spirit of Mr Men, bringing a smile to any fan young or old. Ideal for gifting, this coaster makes a thoughtful present for birthdays, housewarmings, or Christmas. Collect the full range of Mr Men characters to mix and match, and add a playful British touch to your décor while protecting your home in style. An accident waiting to happen! Poor Mr. Bump just can't stop having accidents. If there was something for Mr. Bump to bump into, he'd bump into it all right.
